description: GORGEOUS & FULLY LOADED 3 Bed | 3 Bath in DESIRABLE ALBION at Willow. Welcome to this lightly lived-in, LIKE-NEW 3 bedroom, 3 bathroom. Perfect blend of WEST COAST CHARM & modern design. Eye-catching CURB APPEAL fts pitched roofs & durable HARDIE SIDING. Inside, enjoy 9-FT CEILINGS, WIDE-PLANK FLOORING & OVERSIZED WINDOWS that flood the space with natural light. GOURMET KITCHEN boasts sleek flat-panel cabinetry, QUARTZ COUNTERTOPS & PREMIUM APPLIANCES—ideal for everyday living & entertaining. SPA-INSPIRED BATHROOMS imported tile & serene PRIMARY ENSUITE. PRIVATE FENCED YARD & cozy BONUS DECK. A RARE SIDE-BY-SIDE HIGH CEILING GARAGE +DRIVEWAY. Located in the HEART OF ALBION, one of Maple Ridge’s most SOUGHT-AFTER FAMILY NEIGHBOURHOODS: PARKS, TRAILS, REC CENTRE. Open Sun Feb 1st 2-4pm
